political.s: FEC: $400 PAC donations; 0% to Republican, 100% to Democratic committees.

labor.s: Via parent company United Airlines: 567 federal penalties totaling $210.7M since 2000 (Violation Tracker).

environment.s: Via parent company United Airlines: CDP Climate Change: B (2024) — management-band disclosure; discloses emissions data but limited target ambition.

dei.s: Via parent company United Airlines: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: Via parent company United Airlines: State regulator action: NY AG (most recent 2026-01-01). ~$90.0M in known settlements. Attorney General James Announces Conviction of Madison County Tax Preparer for Running Decades-Long Ponzi Scheme

execPay.s: Via parent company United Airlines: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 334:1 (median employee pay $96,670) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: United Club is the airport lounge associated with United Airlines and its regional affiliates.

fec.committeeName: UNITED FOOD AND COMMERCIAL WORKERS LOCAL 1262 ACTIVE BALLOT CLUB

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: Via parent company United Airlines: United Airlines: DOT 2025 ATCR — 80.2% on-time arrivals, 2.11 complaints per 100K passengers, 6.1 mishandled bags per 1K. 1 DOT enforcement action (~$1.9M in penalties). Several high-profile in-flight incidents during 2024 (Boeing 777 hydraulic failures, 737 engine cowling separations) triggered expanded FAA oversight; no Part 121 fatalities.
